function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "import requests
from io import StringIO

# Try more endpoints
endpoints = [
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query/batch_query_mz.php',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query.php',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/api/batch_query',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/api/batch_query_mz',
    'https://lipidmaps.org/batch_query_mz.php',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/resources/tools/batch_query/query.php',
]
for ep in endpoints:
    try:
        r = requests.get(ep, timeout=5, allow_redirects=True)
        print(f"GET {ep}: {r.status_code} (final: {r.url})")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"GET {ep}: {type(e).__name__}")
", "test_snippet": "pass", "timeout_seconds": 30}
